generated_code:
# Test for range with single argument and various range patterns

def main():
    # Basic range - single argument
    print("=== Basic range(5) ===")
    for i in range(5):
        print(i)

    # Range with start and end
    print("=== range(2, 6) ===")
    for i in range(2, 6):
        print(i)

    # Range with step
    print("=== range(0, 10, 2) ===")
    for i in range(0, 10, 2):
        print(i)

    # Range with negative step
    print("=== range(5, 0, -1) ===")
    for i in range(5, 0, -1):
        print(i)

    # Nested ranges
    print("=== Nested ranges ===")
    for i in range(3):
        for j in range(2):
            print(i)
            print(j)

    # Range with calculations inside
    print("=== Range with calculations ===")
    n: int = 4
    for i in range(n):
        print(i * i)

    # Range with break
    print("=== Range with break ===")
    for i in range(10):
        if i > 3:
            break
        print(i)

    # Range with continue
    print("=== Range with continue ===")
    for i in range(5):
        if i == 2:
            continue
        print(i)
